column1: # Source tokens are lowercased, English uses Latin, Hindi uses Devanagari.
# This is a STARTER set of ~150 entries focused on:
#   (b) common content verbs / nouns likely in the Modi clip,
#       has no native equivalents -- per the assignment, that's allowed).
# Extend to the full 500-word target by adding domain-specific rows.
# Words not found here fall back to:
#   * Devanagari source (Hindi-like) -> kept as-is (Maithili shares much
#   * Latin source -> deterministic Latin->Devanagari transliteration in
#     translate_lrl.py (English loanwords keep English pronunciation, just
# Maithili has no native equivalents; we keep the English root in Devanagari
# script (consistent with how other Indic languages handle these terms).
